data.name: CheckTransactionApprovalException
data.value: An error occured while checking the transaction.

data.name: OtpActivationFailedException
data.value: An error occured while activating the device.

data.name: StartClientTransactionException
data.value: An error occured please try again later.

data.name: StartOneTouchTransactionException
data.value: An error occured please try again later.

data.name: VerifyLoginFailedException
data.value: An error occured while verifying login. Please try again later.
